items.title: A guide to targeting with Sponsored Products
items.excerpt: Discover tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products.
items.body: Guide A simple guide to effective targeting with Sponsored Products Tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products. Table of contents 1 . An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting What is targeting? 2 . Targeting options with Sponsored Products Automatic targeting Manual targeting Negative targeting Deciding which targeting strategy 3 . Automatic targeting with Sponsored Products Remember this When to choose automatic targeting Just getting started with Sponsored Products? Already have active manual campaigns? 4 . Manual targeting (keywords) with Sponsored Products More about match types Remember this Top tips Keyword types Do your research To note, for Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP) authors and book vendors Choose keyword targeting when: 5 . Manual targeting (product) with Sponsored Products Remember this Choose product targeting when: 6 . Negative targeting with Sponsored Products Consider adding the following as negative keywords Remember this 7 . Setting up strategic targeting for Sponsored Products campaigns How to be strategic Start by defining your business goals Next, choose your campaign strategy 6 tips to remember How campaign structure can impact advertising performance 8 . Sponsored Products targeting checklist An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting Strong targeting is crucial to build a solid foundation for your Sponsored Products campaigns, and can help to match shoppers intents to your products. What is targeting? Targeting is the way you define the context in which you want your ads to appear. That can be done in multiple ways. The most common is the use of keywords that match your ad with the shopping queries customers use when looking for something online. This guide will explore everything you need to know about...

items.title: SP-API Release Notes
items.excerpt: Selling Partner API new features, software updates, and changelog.
items.body: For releases prior to January 19, 2022, refer to Announcements in the Selling Partner API GitHub repo . May 27, 2026 API changes Listings Restrictions API v2021-08-01 Added the optional productType query parameter to the getListingsRestrictions operation. You can use this parameter along with a brand name to evaluate GTIN exemption restrictions for a specific product type. Notifications API v1 Added the filterExpression field to the createSubscription operation. You can use this field to filter events before notification delivery. Filters are applied to the notification payload using Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax. Added DeliveryTipChange as a supported order change type to the OrderChangeType notification schema. You can use this to track the status of a delivery tip for an order. Orders API v0 The following updates apply to veterinary products: Added the approvedAlternativeDetails field to the VerificationDetails object in the updateVerificationStatus operation. You can use this field to submit pre-approved alternative product attributes. Added the interimStatusDetail field to the VerificationDetails object in the updateVerificationStatus operation. You can use this field to provide granular progress updates while an order is pending verification to indicate that a veterinarian has been contacted. Added the ValidInterimStatusCodes field to the RegulatedOrderVerificationStatus object in the getOrderRegulatedInfo response. This field returns the list of supported interim status codes and customer-facing descriptions that you can use when you provide an interimStatusDetail . Orders API v2026-01-01 Added the breakdowns array to the getOrder and searchOrders operations. You can use this attribute to show an order's proceeds breakdown, including delivery tip...

items.title: 关于新开的亚马逊店铺税务问题：增值税、企业所得税，个人所得税，请指教！目前已有部分回款，回到了个人账户。还没有报任何税、还是买单出口
items.excerpt: 背景信息： 2026年2月新开的亚马逊账户，美国站。 3月开始发FBA，3月底开始有订单的，目前为止销售额2万多美金，有部分回款，回到了个人账户。还没有报任何税、还是买单出口，按合规来说雷点比较多。已销售了1个季度，目前需要正规报税规避后续的风险。 问题1：请帮忙讲清楚国内国外的税的政策 问题2：关于报税抵税的具体操作请帮忙指导 问题3：决定转化9810了，需拿营业执照去增加项目以合规出口，中间有哪些需要注意的点 问题4：还有没有别的...

items.title: 分享一下小白一年半的悲惨经历，凄凄惨惨戚戚，终于决定离职，但是还是有些问题希望大佬可以指点一二。
items.excerpt: 各位同仁，大佬，自己是在24年11月来到深圳，老家北方的，替亲戚工厂来深圳做亚马逊开荒，美国红海，家居纺织多变体，纯小白来的，历时一年半的时间，身心俱疲，已经下定决心就是离开了，但是还是有些问题希望大佬们指点一二。 故事很长，有点悲伤，我只选几点我想得到的讲。 1. 我的工作， 自己是小白入行，老板是看重我比较老实，让我管财务比较放心，来了之后就是纯开荒，房租水电，店铺品牌注册，财务，税务，物流，采购，招聘，上架等都是我主要负责，所有...

items.title: 产品开发怎么开？选品不会选？三个思维逻辑打破僵局！
items.excerpt: 大家都在讲运营思维，但在亚马逊上，一个产品能不能卖起来，不仅仅需要运营的努力，产品本身和运营基本是绑在一起的。 运营能放大一个产品的优势，也能把一个产品的问题暴露得更快。产品方向如果错了，后面再怎么优化 Listing、广告、关键词，都只是把错误推得更远。 所以选品不能只靠感觉，也不能只靠工具给出来的搜索量。 真正的产品开发思维，至少要有三层：发散性思维、收敛思维和反推逻辑。 发散性思维负责打开可能性，收敛思维负责判断可行性，反推逻辑...

items.title: #755 - He Almost Hit $10M Then Lost It All
items.excerpt: After losing Amazon accounts, brands, and $700K in inventory, one seller reveals how he rebuilt to 7 figures, and the costly mistake other sellers should avoid.
items.body: After losing Amazon accounts, brands, and $700K in inventory, one seller reveals how he rebuilt to 7 figures, and the costly mistake other sellers should avoid. ► Watch The Podcasts On YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft What happens when an Amazon seller goes from nearly hitting $10 million in annual sales to almost starting from zero? In this episode of the Serious Sellers Podcast, Bradley Sutton welcomes back Swapneel Jain, an e-commerce entrepreneur from India who built a multimillion-dollar Amazon business, lost access to key accounts and brands, and then found a way to rebuild back to seven figures. Swapneel’s journey started long before his Amazon success. While studying law in New Delhi, he was already selling online on eBay and other Indian marketplaces, sourcing products such as memory cards and pen drives from suppliers in China. What began as a small arbitrage side hustle eventually grew into a serious business, helping him pay for school and fund his lifestyle. Later, he expanded into Amazon private label, took some painful early losses, and eventually launched products during COVID that helped him scale into the millions. But the real turning point came when a brand registry issue spiraled into a major Amazon nightmare. After trying to help a friend with a listing issue, Swapneel’s accounts were flagged for brand abuse, resulting in him losing access to multiple brands. Then, a separate inauthentic complaint tied to reselling Logitech products led to more suspensions acro...

items.title: 这个广告应该怎么调整？看完广告数据，我直接建议产品涨2$
items.excerpt: 这个广告应该怎么调整？ 这是一个自动混合广告，整体转化率是 11.3%，ACOS 偏高。 这个广告来自群友投稿，那我们就来深度分析一下。 首先， 我们依然以转化率为核心，先看三个广告位的转化率区别： 顶部位置 13.6% 其余位置 9% 商品页 50% 单看转化率，商品页确实是最高的，但是它的数据量太小，所以不能直接把它作为主要判断依据。 真正有参考价值的，还是顶部位置和其余位置的对比。顶部位置的转化率更高，并且两个位置的 ACOS...

items.title: 碰到这种低价螺旋产品，作为小卖家我该如何破局和解决？自己的新品售价14.99美金，第一个月的时候断货了。断货期间，出现了同功能同材质的竞品A以7.99美金的价格占据市场。还有一个新品B售价仅6.99美金
items.excerpt: 我现有一款新品，售价14.99美金，做了30个vine, 目前刚卖了2个月，现在评价有三十多个，第一个月的时候断货了，于是我补了货 在我的产品断货期间，出现了同功能同材质的竞品A以7.99美金的价格占据市场，产品尺寸会比我更大点，可以适用更多的产品,评价方面我们二者差距不大，这个产品大多都是好评，差评占比特别少 等我接上货后，市场份额已被7.99美金的竞品A所占据，我的销量已大幅缩减 今天我拿产品的一个关键词去查看亚马逊前台，又看到一...

items.title: #754 - Reviving an Amazon Brand On Life Support
items.excerpt: Can a dying Amazon brand come back and double sales without new products? Bradley reveals the PPC, listing, image, and keyword fixes behind both turnarounds in this case study today.
items.body: Can a dying Amazon brand come back and double sales without new products? Bradley reveals the PPC, listing, image, and keyword fixes behind both turnarounds in this case study today. 💰Get Helium 10 with a special discount to start or scale your e-commerce business here: https://h10.me/h10 ► Watch The Podcasts On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft What does it really take to bring an Amazon brand back from the brink? In this solo episode of the Serious Sellers Podcast, Bradley Sutton pulls back the curtain on two real Amazon accounts he is actively managing, including one former seven-figure brand that nearly collapsed after losing its TikTok momentum and another account that doubled year over year without even launching new products. Bradley breaks down how the struggling brand went from relying heavily on TikTok-driven sales to rebuilding Amazon as a channel that could stand on its own. He walks through the exact levers he focused on first: auditing PPC waste, negative matching search terms with clicks but no sales, splitting overloaded campaigns, setting keyword harvesting rules, tightening bid automation, using dayparting, and finding old keyword winners through Search Query Performance and Brand Analytics. He also shares how listing optimization played a major role in both case studies. From testing main images with Helium 10 Audience powered by PickFu to refreshing A+ content and improving keyword coverage, Bradley shows why small improvements in click-through rate and conversio...
